summary: Customer booking form app with GPS/manual pickup mode, drop location logic, and trip type handling (Local/Outstation, Oneway/Round Trip). Currently patching GPS mode visibility: hide manual pickup fields in GPS mode, show them in manual mode, auto-fallback to manual if GPS permission denied.
architectural_notes: Customer Booking Form uses locationMode state ('gps'|'manual') to conditionally render Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields
GPS permission denial auto-switches locationMode to 'manual' and displays error message; existing navigator.geolocation logic is not modified

existing_features.title: In RideRequestForm.tsx, conditionally render the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields based on locationMode state: when locationMode === 'gps', hide both fields completely (do not render them); when locationMode === 'manual', show both fields and keep them required.

In RideRequestForm.tsx, when the browser's GPS permission is denied (the existing geolocation error callback fires), automatically set locationMode back to 'manual', re-show the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields, and display the inline error message: 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' Do NOT modify the existing navigator.geolocation logic itself.
